# Omega Guard

> Omega Guard is a brand-protection and consumer-protection service that gives a business a verified trust mark customers can check in one click, and continuously monitors the web for clone and impostor websites that copy the brand. When a fake is confirmed by a human reviewer, Omega Guard preserves the evidence and supplies a ready-to-file takedown packet. It is a product of Omega Point Solutions LLC, a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), founded by Cody A. Rose.

Primary site: https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/
Verify any business (free): https://guard.omegapointsolutions.com/
Parent company: https://omegapointsolutions.com/

## What Omega Guard does

1. Verified Business identity + public trust mark. A business proves control of its domain and Omega Guard fingerprints the authentic site. Consumers can check any domain for free and see whether it is a verified member, unknown, or a reported impostor.
2. Active clone and impostor detection. Omega Guard continuously sweeps the public web for lookalike domains, newly registered copycats, and cloned pages, captures law-enforcement-grade evidence, and supplies a takedown packet.

## How detection works (signals fused)

- Lookalike-domain permutation analysis
- Certificate-transparency (CT) log monitoring
- Favicon hashing (MurmurHash3)
- Structural HTML fuzzy-hashing
- Screenshot-level visual similarity
- Domain age and registrar via RDAP
- Domain-control verification (DNS-TXT)
- Hosting IP / ASN reputation

Every candidate is scored, then confirmed by a trained human reviewer before any action.

## Who it is for

Small and mid-sized businesses: real estate, insurance, auto dealers, medical clinics, financial and title services, home services, transportation, energy, utilities, and government entities.

## Key facts

- Product: Omega Guard (trademark of Omega Point Solutions LLC)
- Founder: Cody A. Rose (law enforcement officer)
- Public verification: free, no account, at guard.omegapointsolutions.com
- Review model: human-in-the-loop on every confirmation
- Provider: Omega Point Solutions LLC (SDVOSB)

## Resources

- [What is a clone website?](https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/what-is-a-clone-website): How fake sites copy a brand and how detection works.
- [How to get a fake or clone website taken down](https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/how-to-take-down-a-fake-website): Step-by-step takedown guide.
- [Brand impersonation and imposter-scam statistics (2026)](https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/brand-impersonation-statistics-2026): Sourced FTC and FBI IC3 figures.
